column.name: acute7
column.remarks: 7-day sum of daily_strain21 ending on this date.

column.name: chronic28
column.remarks: 28-day sum of daily_strain21 / 4 (= avg*7). Same scale as acute7.

column.name: acwr
column.remarks: Acute:Chronic Workload Ratio = acute7 / chronic28. NULL when chronic28 = 0.

column.name: acwr_flag
column.remarks: BLUE (<0.8), GREEN (0.8–1.3), ORANGE (1.3–1.6), RED (>1.6). NULL when acwr is NULL.

column.name: acwr_message
column.remarks: Short German text describing the ACWR flag.
